videos.headline: Chandler Morris hits Jared Wiley for a TCU touchdown
videos.description: Chandler Morris hits Jared Wiley over the top to put TCU up 7-3.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chandler Morris hits Jared Wiley for a TCU touchdown) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU's Jared Wiley finds the end zone for his 2nd TD
videos.description: Jared Wiley lunges across the goal line for his second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU's Jared Wiley finds the end zone for his 2nd TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Emani Bailey breaks free for a TCU touchdown
videos.description: Emani Bailey breaks free to the outside for a 24-yard rushing touchdown to extend TCU's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Emani Bailey breaks free for a TCU touchdown) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
